title: Lithocoche S1
description: A chill vanilla + modpack that improves the overall chill vibe of minecraft
body:
Lithocoche is a vanilla+ modpack witch just increase the overall vibe and experience of the game by bringing ambiance, effects and even some few features.

Here are some chill ingame screenshots taken with the modpack :)

![Lithocoche prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62af49a2cf817ded7b49575d62b51173fdbe4bb3.jpeg)

![Lithocoche Prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ae61d6c6f64d7a838b80aa9eac3d3fe381b52bc.jpeg)

![Lithocoche Prev3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/448fd31f9f3252506d4cb8352b9df53f825a376c.jpeg)

![Lithocoche Prev4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3afefbe941ee2d898e8d6b5bd648e13ff09b81f.jpeg)

![Lithocoche Prev5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e701660717ccde293fd52d15ca5c2bb2862d18b9.jpeg)

![Lithocoche Prev6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ea17f922a89c83dccdd63080d89b4bb2594347.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
